mapper.insert: MERGE INTO J_참여자관리_참여자추천채용정보 AS target USING ( SELECT #{jobSeekerNo} AS 구직번호, #{recommendedJobCertNo} AS 추천채용정보_구인인증번호 ) AS source ON (target.구직번호 = source.구직번호 AND target.추천채용정보_구인인증번호 = source.추천채용정보_구인인증번호) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET 추천점수 = #{recommendationScore}, 추천사유 = #{recommendationReason}, 베스트채용정보 = #{bestJobInfo}, 수정일시 = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (구직번호, 참여자명, 진행단계, 학력, 전공, 카테고리대분류, 카테고리중분류, 희망직무, 알선상세정보, 생성된검색조건, 추천채용정보_구인인증번호, 추천채용정보_URL, 추천채용정보_기업명, 추천채용정보_제목, 추천채용정보_업종, 베스트채용정보, 추천점수, 추천사유, 저장일시) VALUES (#{jobSeekerNo}, #{participantName}, #{progressStage}, #{education}, #{major}, #{categoryMajor}, #{categoryMiddle}, #{desiredJob}, #{referralDetail}, #{generatedSearchCondition}, #{recommendedJobCertNo}, #{recommendedJobUrl}, #{recommendedJobCompany}, #{recommendedJobTitle}, #{recommendedJobIndustry}, #{bestJobInfo}, #{recommendationScore}, #{recommendationReason}, GETDATE());
mapper.select: SELECT R.PK AS PK, R.구직번호 AS jobSeekerNo, R.참여자명 AS participantName, R.진행단계 AS progressStage, R.학력 AS education, R.전공 AS major, R.카테고리대분류 AS categoryMajor, R.카테고리중분류 AS categoryMiddle, R.카테고리소분류 AS categoryMinor, R.희망직무 AS desiredJob, R.알선상세정보 AS referralDetail, R.생성된검색조건 AS generatedSearchCondition, R.추천채용정보_구인인증번호 AS recommendedJobCertNo, R.추천채용정보_URL AS recommendedJobUrl, R.추천채용정보_기업명 AS recommendedJobCompany, R.추천채용정보_제목 AS recommendedJobTitle, R.추천채용정보_업종 AS recommendedJobIndustry, R.베스트채용정보 AS bestJobInfo, R.추천점수 AS recommendationScore, R.추천사유 AS recommendationReason, R.저장일시 AS createdAt, R.수정일시 AS updatedAt, ISNULL(P.is_active, 0) AS isActive, P.career AS career, P.region_nm AS regionNm FROM J_참여자관리_참여자추천채용정보 R LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING P ON R.추천채용정보_구인인증번호 = P.wanted_auth_no WHERE R.구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo} ORDER BY R.베스트채용정보 DESC, R.추천점수 DESC, R.저장일시 DESC;

SELECT TOP 1 PK AS PK, 구직번호 AS jobSeekerNo, 참여자명 AS participantName, 진행단계 AS progressStage, 학력 AS education, 전공 AS major, 카테고리대분류 AS categoryMajor, 카테고리중분류 AS categoryMiddle, 카테고리소분류 AS categoryMinor, 희망직무 AS desiredJob, 알선상세정보 AS referralDetail, 생성된검색조건 AS generatedSearchCondition, 추천채용정보_구인인증번호 AS recommendedJobCertNo, 추천채용정보_URL AS recommendedJobUrl, 추천채용정보_기업명 AS recommendedJobCompany, 추천채용정보_제목 AS recommendedJobTitle, 추천채용정보_업종 AS recommendedJobIndustry, 베스트채용정보 AS bestJobInfo, 추천점수 AS recommendationScore, 추천사유 AS recommendationReason, 저장일시 AS createdAt, 수정일시 AS updatedAt FROM J_참여자관리_참여자추천채용정보 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo} AND 베스트채용정보 = 1 ORDER BY 저장일시 DESC;

SELECT TOP 1 PK AS PK, 구직번호 AS jobSeekerNo, 참여자명 AS participantName, 진행단계 AS progressStage, 학력 AS education, 전공 AS major, 추천채용정보_구인인증번호 AS recommendedJobCertNo, 추천채용정보_URL AS recommendedJobUrl, 추천채용정보_기업명 AS recommendedJobCompany, 추천채용정보_제목 AS recommendedJobTitle, 추천채용정보_업종 AS recommendedJobIndustry, 베스트채용정보 AS bestJobInfo, 추천점수 AS recommendationScore, 추천사유 AS recommendationReason FROM J_참여자관리_참여자추천채용정보 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo} AND 추천채용정보_구인인증번호 = #{certNo}

SELECT 구직번호 AS jobSeekerNo, 참여자 AS infoName, 성별 AS summaryGender, 진행단계 AS infoStage, 집중알선여부 AS infoFocus, 주소 AS infoAddress, 학력 AS infoEducation, 전공 AS infoMajor, 경력 AS infoCareer, 희망급여 AS infoDesiredSalary, 특정계층 AS specialClass, 취업역량 AS employmentCapacity FROM J_참여자관리 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo}
SELECT 희망순위 AS infoRank, 직무_카테고리_대 AS categoryMain, 직무_카테고리_중 AS categoryMiddle, 희망직무 AS infoJob, 추천키워드 AS recommendedKeywords FROM J_참여자관리_희망직무 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo} ORDER BY 희망순위
SELECT 자격증 FROM J_참여자관리_자격증 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo}
SELECT 직업훈련 FROM J_참여자관리_직업훈련 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo}
SELECT 상세정보 AS infoAlsonDetail, 추천사 AS infoAdditionalInfo FROM J_참여자관리_알선상세정보 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo}

SELECT TOP (#{maxCount}) wanted_auth_no AS certNo, company_nm AS companyName, recrut_title AS recruitTitle, ind_tp_nm AS industryType, wanted_info_url AS jobPostingUrl, sal_desc AS salaryDesc, min_edubg AS minEducation, max_edubg AS maxEducation, career AS career, busi_size AS businessSize, rel_jobs_nm AS relatedJobs, job_cont AS jobContent, major AS major, certificate AS certificate FROM J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING WHERE detail_fetched = 1 AND is_active = 1 AND (close_dt IS NULL OR close_dt >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
AND (
recrut_title LIKE '%' + #{kw} + '%' OR ind_tp_nm LIKE '%' + #{kw} + '%' OR keyword_list LIKE '%' + #{kw} + '%'
OR jobs_cd IN
TRY_CAST(#{code} AS INT)
OR ind_tp_nm LIKE '%' + #{jobCategory} + '%'
OR basic_addr IN
#{unit}
OR basic_addr IN
#{unit}
)
ORDER BY sync_dtm_detail DESC, sync_dtm ASC

SELECT TOP (1) PK AS pk, 구직번호 AS jobSeekerNo, 베스트채용정보 AS bestJobInfo, 추천점수 AS recommendationScore, 추천사유 AS recommendationReason, 저장일시 AS createdAt, 수정일시 AS updatedAt FROM J_참여자관리_참여자추천채용정보 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo} ORDER BY 저장일시 DESC

SELECT TOP (1) CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), 저장일시, 120) AS lastRecommendedAt, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(HOUR, 저장일시, GETDATE()) < 24 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS cooldownActive FROM J_참여자관리_참여자추천채용정보 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobSeekerNo} ORDER BY 저장일시 DESC

SELECT company_nm AS companyNm, recrut_title AS recrutTitle, ind_tp_nm AS indTpNm, jobs_nm AS jobsNm, pref_cond AS prefCond, certificate AS certificate, major AS major, sal_desc AS salDesc, emp_tp_nm AS empTpNm, region_nm AS regionNm, wanted_info_url AS wantedInfoUrl, ISNULL(info_svc, N'고용24') AS infoSvc, reper_nm AS reperNm, tot_psncnt AS totPsncnt, capital_amt AS capitalAmt, yr_sales_amt AS yrSalesAmt, busi_cont AS busiCont, home_pg AS homePg, busi_size AS busiSize, recrut_peri AS recrutPeri, recruit_cnt AS recruitCnt, job_cont AS jobCont, work_time_cont AS workTimeCont, four_ins AS fourIns, retire_pay AS retirePay, welfare_desc AS welfareDesc, career AS career, min_edubg AS minEdubg, max_edubg AS maxEdubg FROM J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING WHERE wanted_auth_no = #{wantedAuthNo}
